(Q3)
Let w0, w1, w2 be the weights and x1, x2, x3 be the inputs in
perceptron learning model and bias b
net = w0.x1 + w2.x2 + w3. x3 + b.
Using the net formula we will calculate the predicted output for
each instances.
Using, handloom activation function,
If net >0, then output = 1
net <0, output = 0.
We will calculate the error after that using formula.
error = Target output - Predicted output
If error value comes o, then no weight updation
If error is other value than o, then apply formula.
Δw = n. (t-o). xi)

If net < 0, output = 0.

This is weight updated where n is the actuation function,
(t-o) is the error and xi is the input instance.
:. [wnew = wold + Δw
similarly, bias will also get updated using formula..
Δ bias = n. (t-0). xi
Here, the value of xi will be kept 1 always as it is
the fixed input in perception learning algorithm.
bias new = bias old + Δ bias
Hence, whenever error is occured then weight and bias both are
updated simultaneously.
